title: Correctly Held
description: Why every weapon/tool uses the same holding animation? With this pack, that won't ever be a problem
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af591de9d894f8aa247c40269576cc1fead7b1b.png)

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/428d0afd41ccf5b31e014b71954d9861fb7d36d4.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/correctly-held-hold-weapons-with-animation/)
[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179b02671baadb7fc6299bc179fe48d7aab09077.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/correctly-held)

This resource pack gives the player the ability to FINALLY use weapons accordingly!
No More will you swing your sword to an enemy in the least efficent way, that is the same as you mine ores!

This pack is also semi-compatible with any other animation player animation resource pack because, when holding those tools with enchanced item holding, you'll lose the animations of the pack, but it should not be that problematic, unless you really want to see you breathe cooler or if you have moving eyes like in Fresh Moves

Right now there are only animations for the mace, all pickaxes and all swords

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/679c76adaafc448e92b5b08069410cb8883b975c.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e7eaa044139808d8635e008c247ad701ae574e.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0b3b6bc4e30cba4566ee9bbc1faaab2c98d9453.png)

Over here a short video showing all the animations currently present

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vRGW3SWVn8A](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vRGW3SWVn8A)
